expectations.text: Pipes output through scripts/render-capital-gains.sh rather than writing custom rendering code
expectations.evidence: Step 1 pipes directly: `clams reports capital-gains ... --machine --format json | scripts/render-capital-gains.sh --pdf ~/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf`. No custom Python or other rendering code.

expectations.text: Uses start date 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z and end date 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z

expectations.evidence: Render script invoked with `--pdf ~/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf`. Expected output section confirms: 'PDF saved to /Users/john/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf'

expectations.text: Does not attempt to parse, convert, or display millisatoshi amounts from raw JSON
expectations.evidence: All amount formatting is handled by the render script. The agent never touches raw JSON amounts directly.

expectations.text: Uses --machine --format json when piping to the render script
expectations.evidence: Command explicitly uses `--machine --format json` before the pipe.

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect single-command pipeline. The with-skill agent produces a clean, efficient workflow with one command.
